rules.title: Ensure 'Enforce password history' is set to '24 or more password(s)'
rules.description: This policy setting determines the number of renewed, unique passwords that must be associated with a user account before an old password can be reused.

rules.title: Ensure 'Maximum password age' is set to '365 or fewer days, but not 0'
Ensure 'Minimum password length' is set to '14 or more characters'
rules.description: Password length is a fundamental defense against brute-force guessing.

rules.title: Ensure 'Password must meet complexity requirements' is set to 'Enabled'
Ensure 'Account lockout threshold' is set to '5 or fewer invalid logon attempts, but not 0'
Ensure 'Audit: Force audit policy subcategory settings' is set to 'Enabled'
rules.description: CIS-CAT could not evaluate the registry path on the target host.

rules.title: Ensure 'Windows Firewall: Domain: Firewall state' is set to 'On (recommended)'
Ensure 'Configure SMB v1 client driver' is set to 'Enabled: Disable driver'
rules.description: SMBv1 is vulnerable to EternalBlue-class exploits and should be disabled on all modern Windows systems.

rules.title: Ensure 'Require encryption on all fixed drives' is set to 'Enabled'
Ensure 'Turn off Autoplay' is set to 'Enabled: All drives'
